categories.description: Golden State Warriors @ New Orleans Pelicans

event.description: Golden State Warriors @ New Orleans Pelicans

article.description: — Andrew Wiggins scored 30 points and the Golden State Warriors secured a knockout round spot in the NBA Cup with a 112-108 victory over the reeling New Orleans Pelicans on Friday night.
article.headline: Wiggins scores 30, Warriors win their NBA Cup group with a 112-108 triumph over the Pelicans

images.caption: Trey Murphy III's 3-point attempt rattles into the rim and brings the Pelicans within two points near the end of the fourth quarter.
images.name: Trey Murphy's late triple keeps Pelicans alive

keywords: Golden State Warriors @ New Orleans Pelicans
article.linkText: Wiggins scores 30, Warriors win their NBA Cup group with a 112-108 triumph over the Pelicans
article.story: NEW ORLEANS -- — Andrew Wiggins scored 30 points and the Golden State Warriors secured a knockout round spot in the NBA Cup with a 112-108 victory over the reeling New Orleans Pelicans on Friday night. Stephen Curry scored 19 for the Warriors, who improved to 3-0 in West Group C and clinched first place in the group when Denver lost to Dallas. Buddy Hield capped his 12-point performance with two free throws with 18.5 seconds left to help Golden State hold New Orleans at bay. Trey Murphy III led New Orleans with 24 points but missed a 3-pointer for the lead with 5 seconds remaining — a shot made possible by Brandon Boston Jr's steal of a Golden State inbound pass. Golden State's Draymond Green was fouled as he grabbed the rebound of Murphy's miss and hit both free throws for the final margin. Jeremiah Robinson-Earl scored 19 points, Brandon Ingram added 18 and Boston 16 for the Pelicans, who fell to 1-2 in group play and lost for the 10th time in 11 games. Jordan Hawkins returned from a seven-game absence caused by back soreness and had six points. Takeaways Warriors: Depth and balance made a difference for Golden State. Green and Brandin Podziemski each scored 11 points. Pelicans: With rookie center and first-round draft choice Yves Missi sitting out because of a sore left shoulder, the injury-riddled Pelicans opened the game with their 12th different starting lineup of the season (Elfrid Payton, Daniel Theis, Javonte Green, Ingram and Murphy). Key moment Wiggins made a spin move and tossed in a 13-foot floater while being fouled by Robinson-Earl with 5:13 left. He completed the three-point play to make it 102-94 and the Pelicans got no closer that 110-108 after that. Key stat Golden State outrebounded New Orleans 52-42. Up next Warriors: Visit San Antonio on Saturday night. Pelicans: Visit Indiana on Monday night. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/NBA

images.caption: Victor Wembanyama (center left) and the San Antonio Spurs are favored entering the NBA Finals.
images.credit: Jesse D. Garrabrant/NBAE via Getty Images

images.alt: Jalen Brunson
images.caption: Jalen Brunson has the New York Knicks in the NBA Finals for the first time since 1999.

images.alt: Jalen Brunson
images.caption: The Knicks are now heavy favorites to win the Eastern Conference after taking a 3-0 series lead over the Cavs.
images.credit: Nathaniel S. Butler/NBAE via Getty Images
images.name: Jalen Brunson [608x342]

images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander  [1296x729]
